Class RiskFreeRateMappingResource

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.rest.DailyLimitUpdCreateLogger<RiskFreeRateMapping>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreate<RiskFreeRateMapping>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreateResource<RiskFreeRateMapping>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreateDeleteAudit<RiskFreeRateMapping>
grafiosch.rest.UpdateCreateDeleteAuditResource<RiskFreeRateMapping>
grafioschtrader.rest.RiskFreeRateMappingResource
@RestController @RequestMapping("/api/riskfreeratemapping") public class RiskFreeRateMappingResource extends UpdateCreateDeleteAuditResource<RiskFreeRateMapping>
REST controller for the risk-free-rate currency-to-security mapping. Inherits standard CRUD endpoints from UpdateCreateDeleteAuditResource (POST /, PUT /, DELETE /{id}) plus a list endpoint and two helpers that populate the editable-table dropdowns in the admin UI.

Access: every authenticated user can read. Create is open to any role. Update/delete is enforced by the standard ownership rule of UserAccessHelper.hasRightsOrPrivilegesForEditingOrDelete(User, Auditable) — i.e. row owner OR holder of ROLE_ADMIN / ROLE_ALL_EDIT. ROLE_LIMIT_EDIT users are capped at 2 CUD operations per day on this entity (registered via GLOB_KEY_LIMIT_DAY_RISKFREERATEMAPPING in GlobalParamKeyDefault).

Cross-field validation (the posted currency must match the ISO currency of the selected security) is enforced in RiskFreeRateMappingJpaRepositoryImpl.saveOnlyAttributes(RiskFreeRateMapping, RiskFreeRateMapping, Set), not here, so the rule cannot be bypassed by non-REST entry points.
